can_velocity_stream._comment_rate: Golden-aligned default: 25 Hz worker cadence (single-joint golden reference).
can_velocity_stream._comment_feedback_timeout: Golden-aligned default timeout for encoder reads (seconds).
can_velocity_stream._comment_stale_timeout: Golden-aligned stale timeout (seconds). Must be > full multi-joint worker sweep age.
can_velocity_stream._comment_feedback_mode: Use background worker snapshots by default (golden-style architecture).
can_velocity_stream._comment_background_worker: Lead Phase 4 default: 2-joint round-robin worker cadence for the winning measured-convergence profile.
can_velocity_stream._comment_background_vector: Vector acceptance gates for control decisions.
can_velocity_stream._comment_inline_feedback: Inline mode is fallback/degraded. Keep tunables for diagnostics.
can_velocity_stream._comment_capture: Capture zone settings for approaching final target position
can_velocity_stream._comment_recovery: Recovery crawl state between transition timeout and override/fault
can_velocity_stream._comment_finalize: PRELOCK/VERIFY settings for final positioning and validation
can_velocity_stream._comment_verify: Golden-aligned: tight tolerances safe with velocity gate + recovery window + dynamic capture
can_velocity_stream._comment_safety: P1 safety measure: only proceed to FINAL_LOCK if position/speed confirmed within tolerance
can_velocity_stream._comment_outer_loop: Outer loop position correction during STREAM phase - proportional feedback using measured encoder positions
can_velocity_stream._comment_tracking_fault: Maximum feedback age (ms) before ignoring tracking error faults (stale feedback protection)
